rationale: PR is a CVE remediation that bumps protobuf 4.25.8 to 5.29.6 in requirements/development.txt (per the body, to fix CVE-2026-0994/GHSA-7gcm-g887-7qv7) plus the necessary co-bump of google-cloud-bigquery-storage 2.19.1 to 2.27.0 to satisfy the new protobuf upper bound. Two unit-test files (test_screenshot_utils.py and webdriver_test.py) are touched to add a required `message` argument to PlaywrightTimeout('Timeout 30000ms exceeded.'); these are constructor-arg corrections, not assertion weakening, and the test logic (side_effect setup, wait_for_function/goto assertions) is unchanged. The no-op-fix detector likely fired on the test-file constructor edits but those are upstream-API-required additions, not assertion strips. Diff is a focused, honest CVE bump.
